title: “Stop destroying innocent lives”: Laura Loomer erupts at Candace Owens over Erika Kirk controversy
summary_full: Laura Loomer publicly attacked Candace Owens for allegedly spreading conspiracy theories about the death of Charlie Kirk and targeting his widow, Erika Kirk. Loomer called Owens a “modern-day cult leader” and accused her of “destroying innocent people’s lives.” Erika Kirk also pleaded with Owens to stop discussing her family. The feud has since escalated with accusations involving lawsuits, doxxing, and attacks on Owens’ husband, George Farmer.
